title: prunella pienina
intro: Prunella pienina, also known as Selfheal or Heal-all, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family that has been widely used for its medicinal and therapeutic properties. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Prunella pienina has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, thanks to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Prunella pienina include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
